meta.title: ITAsset Copilot: Your AI Agent for Conversational IT Asset Management
meta.description: Automate and secure your ITAM with our AI Agent powered by Microsoft Copilot. Convert complex tracking, allocation, and reporting into simple, chat-based commands leveraging your existing Snipe-IT data.

items.text: Your AI Agent for Conversational ITAM
Transform IT Asset Management with Folio3 ITAsset Copilot
Instantly track, allocate, and report on all equipment using simple chat commands. Integrate with Snipe-IT to cut onboarding delays and mitigate high costs from lost or misallocated assets.

headings.text: Your AI Agent for Conversational ITAM
Transform IT Asset Management with Folio3 ITAsset Copilot

paragraphs: Instantly track, allocate, and report on all equipment using simple chat commands. Integrate with Snipe-IT to cut onboarding delays and mitigate high costs from lost or misallocated assets.

items.text: Why You Need to Automate ITAM Now
Organizations that embrace AI today see faster growth, smarter decisions, and stronger internal service connections.
Provision a new hire's full equipment load (laptop, monitor, etc.) instantly via a single chat command, eliminating manual UI navigation. Request a call
IT and HR teams reclaim valuable time each day by replacing spreadsheet-era workflows with simple, plain-language conversational commands. REQUEST A CALL
Real-time visibility and accountability mitigate the high costs associated with lost, misallocated, or underutilized company equipment. REQUEST A CALL
Instantly retrieve all user and asset records from Snipe-IT, providing an objective, real-time view of inventory and allocation status. REQUEST A CALL

items.text: Leverage the Power of the Microsoft 365 Copilot Ecosystem

The Folio3 ITAsset Copilot is a specialized, conversational IT Asset Management AI Agent designed to turn your existing Snipe-IT data into secure, chat-based commands, deployed right where your team works, in Teams or M365.

headings.text: Leverage the Power of the Microsoft 365 Copilot Ecosystem

paragraphs: The Folio3 ITAsset Copilot is a specialized, conversational IT Asset Management AI Agent designed to turn your existing Snipe-IT data into secure, chat-based commands, deployed right where your team works, in Teams or M365.

items.text: Uncover the full power of conversational ITAM as it automates every step of the asset journey, from instant allocation and tracking to financial reporting and compliance.
Perform critical asset actions, such as assigning a laptop to a new hire by asset tag, all via conversational commands to streamline provisioning.
Use simple chat commands to instantly retrieve all user and asset records from Snipe-IT, providing instant inventory checks and accountability.
Check an employee's assigned assets or list available (unallocated) equipment by category using plain language requests, eliminating manual lookups.
The Copilot acts as an intelligent, conversational overlay, securing and leveraging all your existing data within Snipe-IT.
Connects with platforms like Azure AD, Intune, SCCM, and ServiceNow for streamlined identity verification and automated provisioning workflows.
Sync asset events with HR systems to automate equipment assignment during onboarding/offboarding and integrate with Jira for comprehensive service desk management.
Provides critical visibility into asset utilization rates, costs per department, and lifecycle status for better budget planning.
Offers forward-looking data, such as identifying laptops due for replacement, to optimize capital planning.
Future features include support for warranty/maintenance tracking, license management/compliance reporting, and Idle Asset Alerts.
Ensures data security and regulatory adherence through Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for IT and HR users.
The system maintains comprehensive, time-stamped audit logs, essential for compliance-driven organizations (Healthcare, Finance).
Built to handle thousands of assets across multiple sites and offers essential multi-tenant support for Managed Service Providers (MSPs).
